source: MLB Stats API + Checklist RC tags

methodology.summary: Recent RC players are matched from Checklist Vault RC tags, ranked against MLB leaderboards, and compared with the previous MLB stats snapshot when available.
methodology.guardrail: This is a research signal, not buying advice.
